src: temi is an unparalleled robotic platform introducing a new dimension of development - movement. Using temi’s SDK, developers can create new functionalities and introduce new use cases via temi’s Android tablet. temi’s movement and navigation capabilities run off of it's Linux computer and uses a set of 16 sensors including a Lidar, depth cameras, driving cameras, and microphones. We encourage our developer community to suggest and request expanded functionality within the SDK and we will adhere to your needs. We want to enable you to create skills like never seen before!  We will be constantly improving the SDK and its documentation. Please feel free to reach out to us with any questions or thoughts at developers@robotemi.com
ja: temiは新次元の開発——移動——を導入する比類なきロボットプラットフォーム。temiのSDKを使って開発者はtemiのAndroidタブレットから新機能を作成し新たなユースケースを実現できる。temiの移動・ナビゲーション機能はLinuxコンピュータ上で動作し、Lidar・深度カメラ・走行カメラ・マイクを含む16種のセンサーを搭載。SDK機能の拡張提案を歓迎し、ニーズに対応する。ご質問はdevelopers@robotemi.comまで
